description_long: This mosque features a large rectangular structure with a prominent entrance flanked by two tall, slender minarets capped with blue domes and finials. The central prayer hall is topped by a medium-sized blue dome, surrounded by four smaller decorative domes at the corners. The facade includes arched entryways and colonnaded balconies, with intricate detailing around the main entrance. The building's roof is mostly flat and reddish-brown, contrasting with the white and blue color scheme of the mosque's architectural elements. The mosque's design is symmetrical, with the minarets and domes providing vertical emphasis and a sense of grandeur. The overall appearance suggests a blend of modern and traditional Islamic architectural influences.
description: A large, white mosque with two tall minarets, a central blue dome, and a flat reddish-brown roof, featuring arched entrances and decorative balconies.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat reddish-brown roof, two tall minarets, and the central blue dome with smaller domes around it.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the main entrance, arched doorways, two minarets, and the symmetrical arrangement of domes and balconies.
description_view_2: Opposite side view focusing on the flat roof and the rear of the mosque, with the minarets and domes visible in the background.
description_view_3: Rear view dominated by the large reddish-brown roof, with the tops of the minarets and domes visible above the roofline.
attribute_dome: Five domes are visible: one medium-sized central blue dome and four smaller blue domes at the corners, all with smooth surfaces and pointed finials.
attribute_minaret: Two tall, slender minarets with blue domes and finials, positioned symmetrically at the front corners, rising significantly above the main structure.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern Islamic with traditional elements, featuring domes, minarets, and arched entrances.
